data.name: DeleteingBasemapConfirm2_Message
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete?

data.name: BasemapExisted
data.value: Basemap file already exists, do you want to overwrite?

data.name: CalTarget2
data.value: Zr Major Element Temperature (Watson and Harrison, 1983)

data.name: AboutInfo1
data.value: This project utilizes geochemical data for related chart plotting, calculation, and analysis, aiming to efficiently process geological data and help earth science researchers accelerate their data analysis workflow and improve research efficiency.

data.name: AboutInfo2
data.value: If you're interested in this project, please consider giving it a Star for support! If you find it helpful, you can also buy me a coffee.

data.name: AboutInfo3
data.value: We welcome more researchers to join! Let's maintain and update geochemical calculation methods together, and create more plotting templates! Make the software more powerful and user-friendly!

data.name: no_valid_workbook_or_data_found
data.value: No valid workbook or data found in the file

data.name: excel_missing_required_columns
data.value: The Excel file is missing the following required columns

data.name: failed_to_parse_category_group
data.value: Failed to parse valid category groupings from the file. Please check the category column data

data.name: no_imported_data_to_clear
data.value: There is no imported data to clear

data.name: all_imported_data_cleared
data.value: All imported data has been cleared

data.name: multiple_data_series_hint
data.value: Separate multiple data series with commas, e.g., SiO2, K2O

data.name: tio2_activity_range
data.value: TiO2 activity must be within the range (0, 1]

data.name: oxygen_atom_benchmark_zero
data.value: Oxygen atom number benchmark is zero

data.name: new_version_available_github
data.value: New version found! Please go to the GitHub Release page to download the update.

data.name: enter_language_add
data.value: Enter a language and press Enter to add.

data.name: enter_level_add
data.value: Enter a level and press Enter to add.

data.name: category_structure_min_two
data.value: Category structure must be greater than or equal to 2!

data.name: no_template_or_path_specified
data.value: No savable template or save path specified. Please use Save As to save.

data.name: research_life_smooth_sailing
data.value: years of research, wishing you smooth sailing in life!

data.name: unknown_error_checking_for_updates
data.value: An unknown error occurred while checking for updates

data.name: cannot_parse_version_number_check_release_address
data.value: Unable to parse the version number. Please check the release address

data.name: not_enough_vertices_add_polygon_canceled
data.value: Not enough vertices, add polygon operation canceled.

data.name: language_setting_duplicate_found
data.value: Duplicate items exist in language settings, please check!

data.name: highlight_on_hover
data.value: When enabled, hovering the mouse over a plot object (point, line, area, etc.) will automatically highlight it, and you can click to view information

data.name: ternary_phase_diagram_sum_must_be_one
data.value: The sum of a ternary phase diagram must be 1.

data.name: confirm_clear_all_data
data.value: Clear table data (including plot data points)?

data.name: confirm_clear_data_for_validation
data.value: Validating syntax will clear data table and plot data points. Continue?

data.name: some_data_failed_validation
data.value: Some data failed validation and has been skipped for plotting

data.name: please_select_an_object_to_delete_first
data.value: Please select an object to delete first.

data.name: downloaded_file_hash_mismatch
data.value: The downloaded file hash does not match the server's. The file may be corrupt or tampered with.

data.name: downloaded_content_not_valid_json
data.value: The downloaded content is not in a valid JSON format.

data.name: new_drawing_template_library_version_detected
data.value: A new version of the drawing template library has been detected. Do you want to update the list now?

data.name: current_template_list_latest_version
data.value: The current template list is already the latest version.

data.name: network_connection_failed_cannot_check_for_updates
data.value: Network connection failed, cannot check for updates:

data.name: error_occurred_while_checking_for_updates
data.value: An error occurred while checking for updates:

data.name: confirm_delete_row
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected row(s)?

data.name: confirm_delete_column
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected column(s)?

data.name: template_version_too_high
data.value: Template version is higher than current software version. Please upgrade software to open.

data.name: template_upgrade_warning
data.value: The current template version is older. Saving will upgrade the template version, which may make it unusable in older versions of the software. Continue?

data.name: unable_to_get_latest_release_info
data.value: Unable to get latest release information

data.name: please_select_widget_to_add
data.value: Please select a widget to add:

data.name: click_or_drag_template_json_here
data.value: Click or drag template file (JSON) here

data.name: mouse_snap_auto_recognition_frame_rate
data.value: Mouse Snap Auto Recognition Frame Rate

data.name: confirm_enter_edit_mode_base_map
data.value: Are you sure you want to enter edit mode? This will allow you to modify the base map.

data.name: click_to_pick_coordinates
data.value: Please click in the drawing area to pick coordinates

data.name: repair_missing_or_damaged_templates_and_lists
data.value: Repair missing or damaged drawing templates and lists

data.name: view_latest_server_announcements
data.value: View the latest announcements from the server

data.name: maintain_server_config_and_templates
data.value: Maintain server configurations and template files

data.value: The current diagram template type is not supported. Please update the software.

data.name: click_help_for_guide
data.value: Click the button to view diagram documentation

data.name: unsaved_diagram_template_prompt
data.value: The current diagram template has unsaved changes. Do you want to save them?

data.name: template_no_multilingual_info
data.value: The current template has no multilingual information

data.name: language_switch_error
data.value: An error occurred while switching languages:

data.name: diagram_template_not_found_repair_hint
data.value: Diagram template file not found. Please try using the 'Template Repair Tool' on the home page to fix it.

data.name: confirm_delete_custom_diagram_template
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this custom diagram template?

data.name: missing_drawing_objects_error
data.value: 閳?Missing drawing objects: The template does not contain any lines, polygons, text, or arrows.

data.name: is_not_a_valid_variable_name
data.value: 閳?is not a valid variable name.

data.name: script_return_value_error_must_be_array
data.value: 閳?Script return value error: The script must return an array.

data.name: script_return_value_length_error
data.value: 閳?Script return value length error: Current value is

data.value: 閳?Missing translation: Some texts are missing multilingual translations.

data.name: diagram_template_source_missing
data.value: Diagram template source file does not exist

data.name: template_potential_issues_detected
data.value: The following potential issues were detected in the template:

data.value: Diagram template directory does not exist:

data.name: unsaved_template_changes_confirm
data.value: The current template has unsaved changes. Do you want to save them?

data.name: ternary_diagram_crosshair_not_supported
data.value: Crosshair positioning is currently not supported for ternary diagrams.

data.name: coreldraw_env_not_found_select_program
data.value: CorelDRAW environment variable not found. Please select the application to open.

data.name: inkscape_env_not_found_select_program
data.value: Inkscape environment variable not found. Please select the application to open.

data.name: illustrator_not_found_check_path
data.value: Adobe Illustrator not found. Please check the path settings or select the application to open.

data.name: custom_path_not_set_configure_in_settings
data.value: Custom program path not set. Please configure it in the settings.

data.name: help_file_not_found
data.value: The help documentation file could not be found.

data.name: diagram_help_path_undefined_save_template
data.value: Unable to determine the diagram help file path. Please try saving the template first.

data.name: error_creating_new_template
data.value: An error occurred while creating the new template:

data.name: diagram_template_corrupted_or_invalid
data.value: The diagram template file is corrupted or does not contain a valid diagram template JSON file.

data.name: failed_to_parse_diagram_template_json
data.value: Failed to parse diagram template JSON file

data.name: already_exists_overwrite_confirm
data.value: Already exists. Do you want to overwrite it?

data.name: failed_to_delete_old_directory
data.value: Failed to delete the old directory:

data.name: invalid_diagram_template_no_json
data.value: Invalid diagram template file: diagram JSON file not found.

data.name: script_not_defined_in_template
data.value: Script not defined in the diagram template

data.name: update_available_click_to_download
data.value: New version available, click to update

data.name: dev_mode_warning_non_developers
data.value: Not recommended for non-developers; it may cause unnecessary issues.

data.name: batch_download_new_templates_tooltip
data.value: Batch download new templates not installed

data.name: batch_download_confirm_message
data.value: Detected {0} new templates not downloaded, would you like to batch download them?

data.name: script_no_detailed_calculation_description
data.value: This script does not provide detailed calculation process descriptions.

data.name: trace_function_usage_tip
data.value: Use the trace(...) function in your script to log the calculation process.

data.name: ternary_script_return_value_requirement
data.value: Ternary plot scripts must return an array of at least 3 values [A, B, C]

data.name: script_return_two_values_requirement
data.value: Scripts must return an array of at least 2 values [X, Y]

data.name: spider_element_order_hint
data.value: Select the elements to include in the plot. The list below shows the current plotting order, and you can use the buttons on the right to adjust the horizontal axis arrangement.

data.name: spider_diagram_data_hint
data.value: Paste your data in the table after entering plot mode. Each row represents a sample, columns should match element names above.

data.name: no_valid_data_found
data.value: No valid data found in the table.

data.name: geo_hint_no_custom
data.value: No custom thermometers yet, click + to create.

data.name: geo_hint_select_thermometer
data.value: Please select a thermometer from the left panel

data.name: geo_tooltip_formula_name
data.value: Letters, digits and underscore only, e.g. MyFormula_v1

data.name: geo_placeholder_help_read_confirm
data.value: Click OK to continue after reading the document.

data.name: geo_field_required_hint
data.value: Required fields are marked with *. Version format: x.x.x (e.g. 1.0.0).

data.name: geo_help_add_doc
data.value: Add help document for this language

data.name: geo_help_delete_doc
data.value: Delete help document of current language

data.name: geo_help_no_lang_hint
data.value: Click the + button above to add a language, then edit the help document.

data.name: geo_help_optional_hint
data.value: Help document is optional and supports multilingual RTF rich text.

data.name: geo_validation_formula_name_format
data.value: Formula name only allows letters, digits and underscore

data.name: geo_test_input_invalid
data.value: Invalid test input. Please use comma-separated numbers.

data.name: geo_dialog_apply_overwrite
data.value: Applying will overwrite the current worksheet content. Continue?

data.name: geo_msg_batch_export_success
data.value: {0} official thermometers in total, {1} exported (added/modified) Directory: {2}

data.name: geo_dialog_delete_thermometer
data.value: Are you sure to delete the {0} thermometer "{1}"?

data.name: geo_validate_version_format
data.value: Invalid version format. Only x.x.x is allowed (e.g. 1.0.0, 1.2.3).

data.name: geo_validate_formula_name_invalid
data.value: Formula name can only contain letters, digits and underscores.

data.name: geo_msg_test_input_invalid
data.value: Invalid test input. Please use comma-separated numbers.

data.name: cipw_tooltip_help
data.value: View algorithm description for CIPW Norm Calculation

data.name: cipw_tooltip_export
data.value: Export results to a CSV file

data.name: cipw_tooltip_clear
data.value: Clear all input and calculation results

data.name: cipw_tooltip_calculate
data.value: Run CIPW norm calculation on all rows with data

data.name: cipw_select_row_hint
data.value: Select a data row to view diagnostic details

data.name: cipw_overview
data.value: The CIPW norm calculation (also called CIPW Norm) is a petrochemical method proposed by Cross, Iddings, Pirsson and Washington in 1902. Based on whole-rock major-element oxide analyses, it allocates oxides to a set of idealized standard minerals in a fixed priority order, supporting rock classification and comparative studies.

data.name: cipw_step1_detail
data.value: • Normalize input major-element oxides on an anhydrous basis (to 100%) • Partition iron: split FeOT into FeO and Fe₂O₃ using the user-defined Fe³⁺/Fe ratio • Combine MnO into FeO based on molar ratio • Convert oxide mass percentages to moles

data.name: cipw_step2_detail
data.value: Consume volatile components in priority order to form: • Calcite (Cc): CO₂ + CaO • Fluorite (Fl): F + CaO • Pyrite (Py): S + FeO • Halite (Hl): Cl + Na₂O • Thenardite (Th): SO₃ + Na₂O

data.name: cipw_step3_detail
data.value: Allocate trace components to accessory minerals: • Zircon (Z): ZrO₂ + SiO₂ • Apatite (Ap): P₂O₅ + CaO • Chromite (Cm): Cr₂O₃ + FeO • Ilmenite (Ilm): TiO₂ + FeO • Titanite (Tn): TiO₂ + CaO + SiO₂ • Rutile (Ru): residual TiO₂

data.name: cipw_step4_detail
data.value: Determine the alumina saturation type from the molar ratio between residual Al₂O₃ and alkalis + CaO: • Peralkaline: Na₂O + K₂O > Al₂O₃ • Metaluminous: Al₂O₃ ≤ CaO + Na₂O + K₂O • Peraluminous: Al₂O₃ > CaO + Na₂O + K₂O

data.name: cipw_step5_detail
data.value: Allocate alkalis and alumina to feldspars in turn: • Orthoclase (Or): K₂O + Al₂O₃ + 6SiO₂ • Albite (Ab): Na₂O + Al₂O₃ + 6SiO₂ • Anorthite (An): CaO + Al₂O₃ + 2SiO₂ • Corundum (Cor): residual Al₂O₃ (peraluminous case) • Acmite (Ac): Na₂O + Fe₂O₃ + 4SiO₂ (peralkaline case) • Residual alkali silicates (ns, ks)

data.name: cipw_step6_detail
data.value: Allocate iron oxides to minerals: • Magnetite (Mt): Fe₂O₃ + FeO • Hematite (Hm): residual Fe₂O₃

data.name: cipw_step7_detail
data.value: Distribute remaining MgO, FeO and CaO to ferromagnesian silicates: • Diopside (Di): CaO + MgO + 2SiO₂ (Mg end-member) • Hedenbergite (Hd): CaO + FeO + 2SiO₂ (Fe end-member) • Enstatite (En): MgO + SiO₂ • Ferrosilite (Fs): FeO + SiO₂ • Wollastonite (Wo): residual CaO + SiO₂

data.name: cipw_step8_detail
data.value:
Adjust according to the SiO₂ residual:
▶ Oversaturated (SiO₂ left over): form quartz (Q) ▶ Saturated (SiO₂ exactly used): no quartz, no feldspathoids ▶ Undersaturated (SiO₂ deficient): convert minerals in priority order— • Hypersthene (En+Fs) → Olivine (Fo+Fa) • Orthoclase (Or) → Leucite (Le) • Leucite (Le) → Kalsilite (Kp) • Albite (Ab) → Nepheline (Ne)

data.name: cipw_step9_detail
data.value: • Multiply each mineral mole count by its molar mass to obtain its standard mineral mass • Normalize to mass percentages (wt%) for output • Report silica saturation, alumina saturation state and mass-balance error diagnostics

data.name: cipw_references_content
data.value: • Cross, W., Iddings, J.P., Pirsson, L.V., Washington, H.S. (1902). A Quantitative Chemico-Mineralogical Classification and Nomenclature of Igneous Rocks. • Le Maitre, R.W. (2002). Igneous Rocks: A Classification and Glossary of Terms. Cambridge University Press. • Kelsey, C.H. (1965). Calculation of the CIPW norm. Mineralogical Magazine, 34, 276-282.

data.name: cipw_msg_no_data
data.value: No valid data row found. Please input oxide content first.

data.name: cipw_confirm_clear_msg
data.value: Are you sure you want to clear all input and calculation results?

data.name: data_toolbar_add_row_above_tooltip
data.value: Insert a row above the current selection

data.name: data_toolbar_update_chart_tooltip
data.value: Plot the current data on the chart

data.name: data_toolbar_add_row_below_tooltip
data.value: Insert a row below the current selection

data.name: data_toolbar_clear_all_data_tooltip
data.value: Clear all data in the table

data.name: shortcuts_intro
data.value: This page lists the shortcuts supported in the current version. It is read-only and cannot be edited here.

data.name: shortcuts_hint
data.value: Tip: Some shortcuts only work when the related page is active or has keyboard focus.

data.name: shortcut_group_plot_desc
data.value: These shortcuts mainly work on the diagram editing page.

data.name: shortcut_group_add_desc
data.value: Use these shortcuts to quickly create common objects on the plot page.

data.name: shortcut_group_template_desc
data.value: These actions apply to template cards in browse mode.

data.name: shortcut_group_rich_text_desc
data.value: These shortcuts apply to rich text editing areas such as help documents.

data.name: shortcut_action_redo_desc
data.value: Restore the action that was just undone.

data.name: shortcut_action_delete_selected_desc
data.value: Delete the currently selected plot object.

data.name: shortcut_action_save_plot_desc
data.value: Save the current diagram or template content.

data.name: shortcut_action_quick_favorite_keys
data.value: Ctrl+click the right side of the card

data.name: shortcut_action_quick_favorite_desc
data.value: Quickly toggle the favorite state of a template.

data.name: shortcut_action_quick_delete_keys
data.value: Ctrl+click the left side of the card

data.name: shortcut_action_quick_delete_desc
data.value: Delete a custom template directly without confirmation.

data.name: shortcut_action_bold_desc
data.value: Toggle bold for the selected text.

data.name: shortcut_action_italic_desc
data.value: Toggle italic for the selected text.

data.name: shortcut_action_underline_desc
data.value: Toggle underline for the selected text.

data.name: parsing_table_and_refreshing_layer_please_wait
data.value: Parsing table and refreshing layer, please wait...

data.name: delete_selected_data_and_drawing_objects
data.value: Delete selected data and drawing objects?

data.name: selected_data_and_drawing_objects_deleted
data.value: Selected data and drawing objects have been deleted.

data.name: selected_drawing_objects_deleted_data_kept
data.value: Selected drawing objects have been deleted, data kept.

data.name: no_source_data_found_only_drawing_objects_deleted
data.value: No source data found; only drawing objects were deleted.

data.name: dataPrep_fe3Tooltip
data.value: Used only for "Empirical ratio correction" and represents the empirical Fe3+/Fe ratio.

data.name: dataPrep_autoBackfillIronOxides
data.value: Automatically backfill FeO / Fe2O3 when missing

data.name: dataPrep_noWorksheetToProcess
data.value: There is no worksheet available for processing.

data.name: dataPrep_detectionLimitPreview
data.value: The current page does not include detection-limit replacement or data-cleaning parameters.

data.name: dataPrep_previewSummary
data.value: Detected oxide columns: {0}; enabled modules: {1}; iron valence method: "{2}"; Fe3+/Fe empirical ratio: {3:0.00}.

data.name: dataPrep_detectionReplaceHalf
data.value: Replace with half of detection limit

data.name: dataPrep_noProcessableData
data.value: The current worksheet has no processable data. Please import a table that contains field headers first.

data.name: dataPrep_processingSummary
data.value: Processed {0} rows and identified {1} numeric columns; detection-limit replacements {2}, outliers marked {3}, outliers cleared {4}, missing values filled {5}.

data.name: dataPrep_noteDetectionReplacedWithHalf
data.value: Detection-limit value replaced with half of the limit

data.name: dataPrep_noteDetectionNoLimitFallbackZero
data.value: b.d.l. has no numeric limit; treated as 0

data.name: dataPrep_noteNonNumericAsMissing
data.value: Unable to parse as numeric; treated as missing

data.name: diagram_editor_translation_hint
data.value: Edit multilingual text for titles, axes, labels, and other diagram content. Add or remove languages here to update the diagram's supported languages.

data.name: at_least_two_languages_swap
data.value: At least two languages are required to swap.

data.name: confirm_delete_language
data.value: Delete language '{0}'? This cannot be undone.
